name: Celestial
short_description: Celestial is an Open world Space survival game playing on a Spherical world of roughly 700km2. Survive in a hostile environment with a variety of roaming creatures. explore ancient ruins of an alien civilization, learn their technologies and use them to find a way back home.
detailed_description:
Celestial is an open-world space survival game playing on a spherical planet.

It's the year 2542 and you play in the role of an Astronaut who is tasked with testing the first Warp drive created by Humankind,
but after a chain of events, you end up getting sucked into a black hole and teleported to an unknown part of the universe.

Now it is up to you to survive against various roaming alien creaturs, encounter a dangerous environment with sand storms, hurling tornados, and radioactive clouds.

Key features.

- Spherical world of 700km2. (still in development.)

The Planet is Currently still in development and I will add more new Continents with new biomes in the future.

- Variety of roaming Ai some of which are machines and other alien creatures.
.
Currently, there are 6 different hostile Ai roaming the planet each with different kinds of abilities. more to come in the future!

- Hostile environment.

the planet comes with several different dangers like sand storms, tornados, radioactive clouds and a toxic atmosphere with no breathable air.

- Gather resources to build up your base.

Currently, there are 8 gatherable resources like fruits, ores, and corpses, and over 10 craftable resources that can be used to build useful machines and base parts.

-Ancient Ruins

Explore ancient ruins and reactivate the technologies found within to one day find a way back home by learning and using the alien machines.
